text.title: Industry-Specific Funnel Drop-offs and Tactics
text.summary: Biggest drop-off points and top optimization tactics per industry: SaaS, e-commerce, and mobile app.

section.title: SaaS
section.p: Biggest drops: Homepage to Signup (2-5% conversion), Signup to Activation (30-50%), Free to Paid (3-5%).

list.item: Product tour on homepage — let users see value before committing
Interactive demo before signup — converts intent-heavy visitors
Immediate value in free tier — users must hit aha moment within first session
Usage-based upgrade prompts — trigger when user approaches feature limit

section.title: E-commerce
section.p: Biggest drops: Product to Cart (3-8%), Cart to Checkout (40-60% abandon), Checkout to Purchase (50-70%).

list.item: Show shipping costs on product page — surprise costs at checkout cause 35% of abandonment
Guest checkout — account creation requirement causes 25% of cart abandonment
Cart abandonment email sequence — recovers 5-10% of abandoners
Express checkout buttons (Apple Pay, Google Pay) — reduces payment friction

section.title: Mobile App
section.p: Biggest drops: Store to Install (15-30%), Install to Open (70-85%), Open to Core Action (20-40%).

list.item: ASO (keywords, screenshots) — improves Store to Install conversion
Delay push notification prompt — ask after user has experienced value, not on first open
Skip onboarding to core action — reduce to 1 screen maximum
Contextual permission requests — explain why each permission is needed before requesting
Mobile Apps overall funnel: 0.5-1.5% (Store to Core Action)
Fintech overall funnel: 0.5-2% (Landing to Account Open)
